title: eritrichium thymifolium subsp. thymifolium
intro: Eritrichium thymifolium subsp. thymifolium, also known as alpine dropseed or alpine eritrichium, is a perennial plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to high-altitude mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its health benefits, such as boosting the immune system and supporting digestive health.
